tasks.title: Implement Initial Navmesh Generation on Scene Load
tasks.description: Create functionality to generate a navmesh when a scene is loaded, checking for cached data first.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Create test scenes with various wall configurations
2. Verify navmesh is correctly generated on scene load
3. Test with and without cached data
4. Validate that open doors are properly filtered out
5. Ensure error handling works when navmesh generation fails
6. Measure performance on scenes of varying complexity

tasks.title: Implement Navmesh Caching System
tasks.description: Create a system to cache generated navmeshes as scene flags and load them on subsequent scene visits.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Generate navmesh and verify it's properly stored in scene flags
2. Reload the scene and confirm cached data is used instead of regenerating
3. Test with different scene configurations to ensure cache works correctly
4. Verify cache invalidation works when needed
5. Test serialization/deserialization edge cases (very large navmeshes, special characters)

tasks.title: Implement Live Navmesh Updates on Wall Changes
tasks.description: Create a system to update the navmesh in real-time when walls are created, updated, or deleted.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Create, update, and delete walls in a test scene
2. Verify navmesh is correctly regenerated after each action
3. Test debouncing by making rapid wall changes
4. Ensure pathfinding continues to work correctly after updates
5. Test with complex wall configurations
6. Measure performance impact of live updates

tasks.title: Create Visual Debug Layer for Navmesh
tasks.description: Implement a visual debugging system to render the navmesh and its components for development and troubleshooting.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Test rendering of polygons and triangulation with various map configurations
2. Verify color coding is clear and helpful for debugging
3. Test UI controls for toggling different visualization options
4. Ensure debug layer doesn't interfere with normal map interaction
5. Test performance with large/complex navmeshes
6. Verify debug layer updates correctly when navmesh changes

tasks.title: Implement Agent Size-Based Navmesh Generation
tasks.description: Create functionality to generate and cache separate navmeshes for different creature sizes (Medium, Large, Huge).
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Generate navmeshes for different agent sizes
2. Visually verify that larger agent sizes correctly cannot path through narrow corridors
3. Test with various wall configurations and agent sizes
4. Verify caching works correctly for all sizes
5. Test performance impact of generating multiple navmeshes
6. Ensure correct navmesh is used based on token size

tasks.title: Implement Pathfinding Integration with three-pathfinding
tasks.description: Create a system to use the generated navmesh with the three-pathfinding library for actual path calculations.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Test path calculation between various points on different maps
2. Verify paths are valid and don't pass through walls
3. Test with different token sizes to ensure correct navmesh is used
4. Compare paths with the current grid-based system to verify improvements
5. Test edge cases like unreachable destinations
6. Measure performance compared to grid-based pathfinding

tasks.title: Implement Advanced Dynamic Cost Pathfinding
tasks.description: Extend three-pathfinding to support per-edge custom cost functions during A* search based on portal widths and creature sizes.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Test path calculation with different creature sizes
2. Verify that paths correctly avoid narrow passages based on creature size
3. Test that 'tight squeeze' passages have higher costs and are avoided when better options exist
4. Compare with the basic agent size implementation to verify improvements
5. Test with complex maps with various passage widths
6. Measure performance impact of the custom cost function

tasks.title: Implement Web Worker Offloading for Navmesh Generation
tasks.description: Move the computationally intensive navmesh generation process to a Web Worker to prevent UI freezing on large maps.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Test navmesh generation with Web Worker on maps of various sizes
2. Verify UI responsiveness during generation of large navmeshes
3. Test progress reporting functionality
4. Verify error handling when generation fails
5. Compare performance with and without Web Worker
6. Test on different browsers to ensure compatibility

tasks.title: Implement Fallback Strategy and User Controls
tasks.description: Create a fallback system and user controls for manual navmesh rebuilding when automatic generation is too slow or fails.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Test the 'Rebuild Navmesh' button functionality
2. Verify different update modes (automatic, manual, onSave) work correctly
3. Test the performance threshold detection and suggestion dialog
4. Test with very large maps to ensure fallback strategy works
5. Verify UI notifications provide clear feedback
6. Test settings persistence between sessions

tasks.title: Implement Comprehensive Testing and Performance Optimization
tasks.description: Create a comprehensive testing suite and optimize performance for various map sizes and complexities.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Run benchmarks on various map sizes and complexities
2. Test optimization techniques and measure performance improvements
3. Verify error reporting works correctly
4. Test with edge cases (very large maps, complex geometries)
5. Verify memory usage is reasonable during and after navmesh generation
6. Test compatibility with other modules that might affect walls or pathfinding
